Test Case/Scenario: A valid login establishes the session and hands off to Inventory.
Test Steps: 1) Open login page. 2) Enter valid username + password. 3) Click Login.
Expected Results: URL is /inventory.html; inventory container displayed; 6 products listed.

Test Case/Scenario: Adding a product on Inventory carries its identity into the Cart.
Test Steps: 1) Log in. 2) Add first product (note name + price). 3) Confirm button flips to Remove and badge = 1. 4) Open cart.
Expected Results: Cart shows 1 row with same name, price, qty = 1; badge count = 1 survives navigation.

Test Case/Scenario: Multiple distinct products all cross the boundary intact.
Test Steps: 1) Log in. 2) Add first 3 products (note each name + price). 3) Wait badge = 3. 4) Open cart.
Expected Results: Cart shows 3 rows whose (name, price) set exactly matches products added.
Remarks: Chrome intermittent — href-less onClick-anchor SPA race (also flaky at baseline); reliable on Firefox/Edge.

Test Case/Scenario: Removing a product on the Cart page syncs back: the Inventory button reverts.
Test Steps: 1) Log in, add first product, wait badge = 1. 2) Open cart. 3) Click Remove. 4) Continue Shopping to Inventory.
Expected Results: Cart empties, badge = 0; Inventory item button reverts to Add to cart.
Remarks: Chrome intermittent (SPA click race); reliable on Firefox/Edge.

Test Case/Scenario: Reverse direction: removing on Inventory empties the Cart.
Test Steps: 1) Log in, add first product, wait badge = 1. 2) Toggle item off from Inventory. 3) Wait badge = 0. 4) Open cart.
Remarks: Chrome intermittent (SPA click race); reliable on Firefox/Edge.

Test Case/Scenario: Cart state persists across a Cart ↔ Inventory round trip.
Test Steps: 1) Log in, add 2 products, wait badge = 2. 2) Open cart (2 items). 3) Continue Shopping to Inventory.
Expected Results: Badge still 2; both items show Remove on Inventory.
Remarks: Chrome intermittent (SPA click race); reliable on Firefox/Edge.

Test Case/Scenario: Reset App State (burger menu) clears the cart badge everywhere.
Test Steps: 1) Log in, add 2 products, wait badge = 2. 2) Burger menu → Reset App State. 3) Wait badge to clear.
Remarks: Known SauceDemo quirk: Reset clears badge but does not repaint inventory buttons until reload — badge is the asserted signal.

Test Case/Scenario: Cart contents flow into the Overview and the totals add up.
Test Steps: 1) Log in, add 2 products, open cart. 2) Start checkout, fill info, continue to Overview. 3) Read overview rows and totals.
Expected Results: Overview (name, price) set matches cart; subtotal = sum of item prices; total = subtotal + tax.
Remarks: Chrome intermittent (SPA click race); reliable on Firefox/Edge.

Test Case/Scenario: login → add → cart → checkout → finish → complete → home, asserting each handoff.
Test Steps: 1) Log in. 2) Add first product. 3) Open cart (verify item). 4) Checkout: fill info, continue, verify overview + totals. 5) Finish order. 6) Back Home.
Expected Results: Order-complete header shown; after Back Home the cart is empty (badge cleared).
Remarks: End-to-end path; reliable on Firefox/Edge, Chrome intermittent on cart/checkout hops.

Test Case/Scenario: Cart is retained across a logout/login cycle.
Test Steps: 1) Log in, add first product, wait badge = 1. 2) Logout via burger menu. 3) Log back in.
Expected Results: Cart badge = 1 (SauceDemo persists cart in browser storage keyed by user).
Remarks: Documents cart-retention behaviour; Chrome intermittent (SPA click race).
